PreToolUse.description: Block Edit/Write on heuristics.log — append only via Bash echo >>

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('BLOCKED: heuristics.log is append-only. Use Bash: echo entry >> heuristics.log') or sys.exit(2)) if fp.endswith('heuristics.log') else sys.exit(0)"

PreToolUse.description: Block git commit during EXPLORE phase

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); phase=open('SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('SESSION.md') else ''; (print('BLOCKED: cannot commit during EXPLORE phase. Change SESSION.md PHASE to IMPLEMENT first.') or sys.exit(2)) if 'git commit' in cmd and 'PHASE: EXPLORE' in phase else sys.exit(0)"

PreToolUse.description: Block git push if tests have not been run this session

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); phase=open('SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('SESSION.md') else ''; (print('BLOCKED: SESSION.md shows TESTS_RUN: no. Run tests before pushing.') or sys.exit(1)) if 'git push' in cmd and 'TESTS_RUN: no' in phase else sys.exit(0)"

PostToolUse.description: Lint Python files after every write or edit

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['ruff','check',fp,'--quiet']) if fp.endswith('.py') else None"

PostToolUse.description: Run contract tests after any model or schema file is written

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('[hook] Model file changed — running contract tests...') or subprocess.run(['pytest','tests/contracts/','-q'])) if re.search(r'(models|schemas).*\.py$',fp) else None"

PostToolUse.description: Warn if a requirements.txt is modified (dependency policy)

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('WARNING: requirements file modified. Ensure new dependency is justified per CLAUDE.md dependency policy.') if 'requirements' in fp else None"

SessionEnd.description: Warn if heuristics were not written

hooks.command: [ -f SESSION.md ] && grep -q 'HEURISTICS_WRITTEN: no' SESSION.md && echo "WARNING: Session ended with HEURISTICS_WRITTEN: no. Append findings to heuristics.log." >> heuristics.log || true

SessionEnd.description: Warn if SESSION.md was not updated

hooks.command: [ -f SESSION.md ] && [ $(find SESSION.md -mmin +120 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -gt 0 ] && echo 'WARNING: SESSION.md has not been updated in 2+ hours. Update before ending session.' || true
